Manhwa.title: Manhwa
Manhwa.description: A single manhwa entry in the user's collection.

title.description: The primary title of the manhwa.

alternativeTitles.description: Other names the manhwa is known by.

isFavorite.description: Whether the manhwa is marked as a favorite.

notes.description: User notes or review of the manhwa.

updatedAt.description: When the entry was last updated.

userId.description: The ID of the user who owns this entry.

UserSettings.title: User Settings
UserSettings.description: Customizable settings for the user, including status colors.

statusConfig.description: Map of status names to their color hex codes.

userId.description: The ID of the user who owns these settings.
